title: Light Floral Indulgent Irish Soy Milk Stir-fry
description: A light and indulgent vegan dish featuring soy milk as the main ingredient, infused with floral notes from herbs and spices for a unique twist on traditional stir-fries.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok over medium heat.
Add shallots and carrots, cook until they soften slightly.
Stir in herbs and spices. Cook for another minute to infuse the dish with their flavors.
Pour in soy milk and vegetable broth. Stir well to combine.
Increase heat to high, bring to a boil and then reduce to low, allowing it to simmer for 5 minutes until slightly thickened.
Stir in green peppers and cook for an additional minute or so.
Remove from heat and serve hot.
